svg.text: ht_tail.csl — lm_head mesh-GEMV + top-K sampling (output head)
vocab sharded on X, hidden dim on Y. Two orthogonal 2-phase reductions (Y contract, X top-K merge) reuse the SAME reduce colors — repainted + fenced.
(1) Spatial layout: tail band 4 x 8 (ref) + the 5 acts
lm_head dim-contract (no bcast) -> logits on root row
(4) X 2-phase MERGE-reduce (top-K lists, not a sum) — SAME reduce
colors, repainted Y->X, fenced by tail_xready barrier
P-2 router multicast: last block ships Z; multicasts E->W, each Y-PE taps its dim shard (tail_init route / z_recv).
P-1 two-phase all-reduce on Y: RMSNorm sumsq (with bcast) + lm_head dim-contract (no bcast) (tail_reduce_2phase).
P-1 two-phase reduce on X with a MERGE combiner: per-column top-K merged to global (tail_topk_mergereduce_x); G-3 repaint + G-8 fence.
P-6 p2p south emit: east-most root PE -> mux -> host (logits_south_color, OQ0). One token per request.
(2) Task state machine — one-shot per request (prefill = ONE token)
Z multicasts E->W; tap dim shard
widen DSD to bsz*V_pe -> root row
@activate(tail_main): re-park on z_recv for the next request
colors/queues: z_drain=IQ0 (16) - reduce 1st/2nd + bcast = IQ/OQ 2-6 (shared Y & repainted X) - tail_xready = IQ/OQ 1 - logits_south = OQ0 - kickoff = IQ7 (TSC PE).
